# `api.jobs.timeline.response`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/timeline` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.timeline.response(job_display_id: int) -> TimelineResponse
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs timeline response <job_display_id>
```

``GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/timeline`` — full wrapper response.

Returns :class:`~ab.api.models.jobs.TimelineResponse` with tasks,
status metadata, SLA info, and on-hold entries.

## Response

Returns `TimelineResponse`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `success` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Operation success flag |
| `errorMessage` | `Optional[str]` | no | Error message if failed |
| `tasks` | `Optional[list[TimelineTask]]` | no | Timeline task list |
| `onHolds` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Active on-hold entries |
| `daysPerSla` | `Optional[int]` | no | SLA days |
| `deliveryServiceDoneBy` | `Optional[str]` | no | Delivery service provider |
| `jobSubManagementStatus` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Current job sub-management status |
| `jobBookedDate` | `Optional[str]` | no | Job booked date |
